text:
Vocabulary of the world (use): fabric, identity, presence, activity line, @mention, host, daemon, "outlives the terminal," "same agent tomorrow," "hand-carrying."
Banned vocabulary (kill on sight): orchestrate/orchestration, swarm, autonomous, conductor, agent OS, sovereign, decentralized, web3, crypto, seamless, supercharge, teammates-that-never-sleep, revolution/future-of.
